english.customers-subtitle: Just look at these suspiciously satisfied customers!
customer-review: Truly incredible, I've never sharpened a pencil that quickly!
When my grandson first told me about this pencil sharpener I didn't believe him. I soon understood his amazement. I knew this invention would change the world!
Everyone knows the old Chinese proverb - 'Time is money'. This pencil sharpener saves a lot of it!
In schools back in the day, we could've only dreamt of this. Incredible!
discount-enticement: Hurry while it's still in stock!
Order now to get a 20% discount and a FREE pencil!!!
SO WHAT ARE YOU WAITING FOR?

slovene.headline-quote: Šilček, kot ga še nikoli niste videli
slovene.customers-subtitle: Samo poglejte si te sumljivo zadovoljne stranke!
customer-review: Resnično neverjetno, nikoli še nisem tako hitro ošilila svinčnika!
Ko mi je vnuk prvič povedal za ta šilček mu nisem verjel. Po le nekaj minutah pa sem razumel njegovo osuplost. Vedel sem, da bo ta izum spremenil svet!
Gotovo smo že vsi slišali starodavni kitajski pregovor - 'Čas je denar'. S tem šilčkom mi ga preostane ogromno!
V Jugoslaviji smo v šoli o takih izumih lahko le fantazirali. Neverjetno!
discount-enticement: Pohitite dokler je še v zalogi!
Ob takojšnem naročilu prejmete 20% popusta in ZASTONJ svinčnik!!!
slovene.discount-contact: Lahko nas pokličete na 061-825-333, pišete na silcekprodaja@gmail.com
slovene.discount-order: Ali pa naročite samo z enim klikom kar tukaj!
